name: Soft Edged Dovetail Accent Table - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Add chic style to your space with this Soft-Edged Dovetail Accent Table from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Standing 20.25 inches tall, this square accent table features a natural light brown finish with dark brown highlights that add visual interest. The soft-edge design and box-like silhouette with a recessed pedestal base create a distinctive look. Made with a poplar wood frame and tabletop, this accent table works well next to your sofa, chair or bench.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy

Overall Width: 12 inches
Overall Height: 20.25 inches
Overall Depth: 12 inches
Distance from Floor to bottom panel: 2.25 inches
